title: Debug subagent view broken after simplify

log.context: Debug subagent view broken after simplify

Both endpoints working. The code was already committed and pushed (commit `cb09b8f`), so no git push needed.

---

**What broke and what was fixed:**

The subagent view at `terminal.clung.us` was broken because the `/api/subagents` list endpoint was missing a CORS header. The terminal page at `terminal.clung.us` fetches from `https://clung.us/api/subagents` (cross-origin), and without `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`, browsers block the response silently — so the agent list never populated and n...(truncated)
